data.body: CHECKPOINT: Updated CLAUDE.md — (1) added '/dso:update-docs' row to Quick Reference table (After epic completion), (2) confirmed dso:doc-writer already present in named-agent dispatch table, (3) removed REVIEW-DEFENSE HTML comment from Agent routing line. AC verified: grep-q 'doc-writer' CLAUDE.md and grep-q 'update-docs' CLAUDE.md both pass. Ready for commit.
